call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Good, thanks. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm thinking about consolidating some debt. Agent: Excellent! That's a very common use for our loans.  We can definitely help with that. What kind of debt are we looking at? Customer: Credit cards, mostly.  Around 8 grand. Agent: Okay, so a $10,000 Personal Loan at 8.99% would cover that and give you a little extra for, you know, emergencies. The monthly payments would be approximately $198.  Does that sound manageable? Customer: Hmm, that's… actually pretty good. What are the terms? Agent: It's a 60-month term.  No prepayment penalties.  We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. Customer: Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a pre-approved offer. We are offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%. Customer: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? I have excellent credit! Agent: Well, sir, the rate is based on several factors… Customer: Look, I'm not interested. Take my number off your list.  I'm busy. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by Green Bank.  How are you today? Customer: Yeah, hi. I'm good.  I'm looking at a home renovation. Agent: Fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%.  What kind of renovation are you planning? Customer: Kitchen remodel. It's gonna be expensive. Agent: I bet!  Okay, so with a $15,000 loan at 7.49%, your monthly payments would be around $282.  We have flexible repayment options.  Would you like me to go over those? Customer: Uh, yeah, that sounds good.  What's the longest term you offer? Agent: We can go up to 72 months.  But a shorter term means less interest paid overall.  We also have a 36-month option. Customer: Hmm… 36 months sounds better.  Can we lock in that rate? Agent: Absolutely. Let's get the application started.

Agent: Hello Mr. Brown? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We have a great offer on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I wasn't interested!  This is ridiculous! Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are offering a $5000 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%. Customer: I don't want it!  I want to be removed from your list!  This is harassment! *click*

Agent: Hi Susan, this is Mark from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a personal loan. How can I help you today? Customer: Well, I'm thinking about getting a new car. My old one is… well, it's on its last legs. Agent: I understand. A new car is a big expense. We're pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.49%.  Would that be enough to cover a down payment? Customer: Maybe. I haven't really looked yet. Agent: Okay. The monthly payments would be around $175. We can adjust the loan amount if needed.  Do you have a specific car in mind? Customer: Not yet. I'm just starting to research. Agent: That's perfectly fine.  We can hold this pre-approval for 30 days.  Would you like me to send you some information about our loan options via email? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

Agent: Hello Mr. Wilson? This is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering a… Customer: Look, I'm unemployed. I don't need a credit card. Where did you even get my number? Agent: We are offering a $1000 Signature Credit Card at 24.99%... Customer: *click*

Agent: Hi Linda, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by First National Bank. How are you doing today? Customer: I'm good, thanks. I'm looking at consolidating some high-interest debt. Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 6.99%. What kind of debt are we talking about? Customer: Mostly credit cards and a small medical bill. Around $18,000. Agent: Okay, so a $20,000 Personal Loan at 6.99% would cover that and give you a little breathing room. The monthly payments would be approximately $358. We also have a small origination fee of $200.  Is that something you're comfortable with? Customer: An origination fee?  What exactly does that cover? Agent: It covers the cost of processing the loan and verifying your information. It's a standard fee. Customer: Hmm… okay.  What are the terms? Agent: We offer terms from 24 to 72 months.  The longer the term, the lower the monthly payment, but you'll pay more in interest overall. Customer: I think I'd prefer a 60-month term. Agent: Great choice. So, that's a $20,000 Personal Loan at 6.99% with a 60-month term and a $200 origination fee.  Your monthly payments will be around $385.  Shall we proceed with the application? Customer: Yes, let's do it.

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Huh? What did you say? Speak up, please. Agent: I said, we're offering a Signature Credit Card. We are offering a $500 Signature Credit Card at 21.99%. Customer: 21.99? What's that mean? Is that a good rate? Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit history… Customer: My what? I don't understand any of this.  I just want to watch my stories. Agent: Sir, it's a percentage… Customer: Just take me off your list. I don't need any credit cards. *click*

Agent: Hi Maria, this is Mark from Finance Solutions. I see you recently requested information about a personal loan on our website. How can I help you today? Customer: Hi Mark. Yes, I'm looking to consolidate some student loan debt and maybe do a little home improvement. Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $25,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 5.99%. That's a fantastic rate, by the way. What's the total amount of your student loan debt? Customer: It's around $20,000. And the home improvement would be another $5,000. Agent: Okay, so a $25,000 Personal Loan at 5.99% would cover both. The monthly payments would be approximately $460. We do have a small application fee of $150, and a potential early repayment fee if you pay it off within the first 12 months.  It's usually around 1% of the remaining balance. Customer: Hmm, an early repayment fee? That's not ideal. Agent: I understand. But it's only if you pay it off very quickly. Most customers don't encounter it. We also offer a range of terms, from 36 to 84 months.  What term are you thinking of? Customer: I'd probably want to pay it off as quickly as possible, so maybe 36 months. Agent: Great. So, a $25,000 Personal Loan at 5.99% with a 36-month term, a $150 application fee, and a potential 1% early repayment fee. Your monthly payments would be around $760.  Does that sound good? Customer: Yes, that sounds perfect. Let's go ahead and get started with the application.

Agent: Hi Kevin, this is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering a… Customer: Look, I'm busy. What is it? Agent: We are offering a $1000 Signature Credit Card at 18.99%. It's a great opportunity… Customer: No thanks. *click*
